overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a mountainous forest region. The character travels along a dirt path past stone ruins and through pine forests with snow-capped mountains visible in the background. The scene features overcast lighting and lush green vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with stone campfire ruins

events.description: beginning at a stone campfire site with ancient ruins
moving past the stone ruins onto the open trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking away from a campfire site along a mountain trail, two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: burning campfire surrounded by stones at the trail side
ancient stone wall ruins beside the path
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance
low stone wall running alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a mountain campsite with a burning fire and stone ruins. Geralt walks along a dirt trail with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance, passing stone walls as the path winds through grassy terrain with scattered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow path with distant river

events.description: river becomes visible in the valley below to the right
path curves slightly to the right toward the forest

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail with panoramic mountain views visible to the right side

entered.detail: river flowing through the mountain valley below
large rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a grassy meadow with a river visible in the distant valley. Snow-capped mountains dominate the right side of the view as Geralt walks past rocky outcrops, with the stone wall falling behind and denser forest approaching ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with mountain vistas

events.description: entering denser pine forest with trees closing in on both sides
path curves left around a large rock formation

agents.ego_description: trekking through the pine forest with occasional glimpses of distant peaks through the trees

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining both sides of the narrow path
boulders and rocky terrain beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a denser forest with tall pines flanking the narrow dirt path. The open meadow gives way to enclosed woodland as the trail winds around rock formations, with mountain views becoming obscured by the tree canopy and the terrain becoming more rugged.

events.description: dead tree stumps and fallen logs appear along the path edges
slight right turn as path continues deeper into forest

agents.ego_description: walking through deep forest terrain with mixed living and dead trees surrounding the path

entered.detail: weathered dead tree trunks and stumps beside the trail
lighter area ahead suggesting an opening in the forest

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through deep forest where dead tree stumps dot the landscape alongside living pines. The path continues toward a distant clearing as the terrain becomes more enclosed, with the mountain views completely obscured by the dense woodland canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open mountain campsite into the depths of a dense, enclosed forest. It begins at a campsite with a burning fire and stone ruins, following Geralt along a winding dirt trail through grassy terrain with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. As the path opens into a wide meadow, the view expands to reveal a river in a distant valley and rocky outcrops before the stone walls fade into the background. The scene then shifts as the open landscape gives way to a denser woodland of tall pines, where the mountain vistas gradually become obscured by the thickening tree canopy. Finally, the camera moves through a rugged stretch of deep forest dotted with dead tree stumps, following the narrow path toward a distant clearing as the environment becomes completely enclosed by the woodland.
